content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-025)

## TOP PRIORITY — resolve the universe obstruction (the new 1.3 wall) [planner decision]
`functorT : ModuleCat.{u} A ⥤ ModuleCat.{u+1} A` (NOT an endofunctor — Ext lands in `u+1`), but `IsHalfExact` and `External.halfexact_free` demand a `ModuleCat.{u}` endofunctor. This blocks bricks (ii) `T` half-exact and (iv) free-conclusion. This is a **typing decision the prover is barred from making** (no-touch / no-new-axiom). Decide between:
- **(a) RECOMMENDED — re-type to the `{u}/{u+1}` shape.** `IsHalfExact` lives in Basic.lean (NOT in `archon-protected.yaml`, which is empty) — generalize its `T` argument to `ModuleCat.{u} A ⥤ ModuleCat.{u+1} A` (or fully universe-polymorphic `{u}→{w}`). `External.halfexact_free` is an `External.*` axiom — re-signing its `T` arg is a planner/user call but is a pure statement change (no proof debt; it's an OB anchor). Cheapest path; keeps the build moving. Confirm the half-exactness predicate `(S.map T).Exact` still typechecks across the universe bump (`ShortComplex (ModuleCat.{u} A)` mapped by a `{u}→{u+1}` functor lands in `ShortComplex (ModuleCat.{u+1} A)` — fine for `.Exact`).
- **(b) deep, NOT recommended now** — collapse the Ext universe via a small-hom derived category for `Y.Modules` (the `IsGrothendieckAbelian (SheafOfModules R)` gap `extGroup` deliberately dodged @011). Multi-iter Mathlib build; defer.

After (a): brick (ii) is pulling the already-proven `ext_tensor_halfexact_of_flat` (@024, membership form) through `functorT`'s End-action module structure into `(S.map functorT).Exact`.

## Coverage debt (MANDATORY — blueprint these 6 helpers)
`archon dag-query unmatched` = 6 `lean_aux` nodes (all in Basic.lean, all proved/axiom-clean, no blueprint entry):
- `endRingHom` — ring hom `A →+* AddMonoid.End (G.obj M)`, `a ↦ (G.map (a•𝟙 M)).hom`. Depends on `Linear.smul_comp`/`comp_smul`, `smul_smul`, `mul_comm` (of A), `Functor.map_*`. Suggest label `def:endRingHom`.
- `moduleOfLift` — instance `Module A (G.obj M)` via `Module.compHom (G.obj M) (endRingHom G M)`. Suggest `def:moduleOfLift` (or fold into `lem:additive_functor_module_lift`).
- `liftAdditiveToModuleCat_additive` — instance; additivity of the lift via `G.map_add`. Fold into `lem:additive_functor_module_lift` or `lem:functorT_additive`.
- `covariantExtFunctor` — covariant `Ext^q_Y(I,-) : Y.Modules ⥤ AddCommGrpCat.{u+1}` (functorial form of `extGroup`'s 2nd variable). Depends on `Ext.comp`/`mk₀`/`add_comp`/`zero_comp`/`comp_mk₀_id`/`mk₀_comp_mk₀`/`comp_assoc`. Suggest label `lem:covariant_ext_functor`.
- `covariantExtFunctor_additive` — instance; via `Ext.mk₀_add`/`Ext.comp_add`.
- `tensorBaseChangeFunctor_additive` — instance; composite of pullback-additive + `tensorLeft_additive` (@024). Suggest `lem:tensorBaseChangeFunctor_additive`.

## Remaining 1.3 bricks (precise handoff, after universe fix)
- **(i) reduction anchor** — local-on-S → affine → Noeth-local ⟹ `S = Spec A`, `A` Noeth-local. Must deliver the `(A : CommRingCat, f : X ⟶ Spec A, I, F)` shape `functorT` already consumes. Model on 1.4's `External.descent_noetherian`. This is an `External.*` anchor (NOT a mathlib-build target).
- **(ii) `T` half-exact** — pull `ext_tensor_halfexact_of_flat` through the End-action module structure to `(S.map functorT).Exact`. Gated on the universe fix above.
- **(iii) `T(k(s)) = 0`** — via `External.adjunction` (@023, proved) + the 1.2 SES on the closed fibre (`FiberExtVanishes` / `Scheme.Hom.fiber`). Needs (i)+(ii) in place first.
- **(iv) free conclusion** — `External.halfexact_free` + `H_represents`. Gated on the universe fix (its `T` arg is an endofunctor).

## Do NOT retry
- **A-action on Ext via `Abelian.Ext.instModule`** — needs `Linear A X.Modules`, which is FALSE (KB known-blocker, @024). The End-action lift built this iter (`liftAdditiveToModuleCat`) is the correct route; it is DONE.
- **`Functor.Linear A` / `Functor.mapEnd` routes** — confirmed absent this iter; the hand-built `endRingHom` is the substitute.
- The 3 long-standing PAUSED/blocked strands (monoidal associator, unconditional `j_!` mono, `relExt`/`R^q f_*`) — unchanged; not on the 1.3 critical path.

## Convergence note
Sorry has been flat 4 across iters 023→025, but each iter lands concrete forward-feeding bricks (adjunction → conditional half-exact → unconditional half-exact + additivity → functor `T`). This is NOT the receding-horizon churn of the 019–021 `j_!` reduction — the bricks compose toward `H_locallyFree`. The plan's reversal tripwire (pivot to anchoring `T`'s existence if BOTH the lift and Ext-packaging recede) did NOT fire; both landed. The functor `T` build (the multi-iter bottleneck named since iter-022) is now structurally complete; the only remaining obstruction before bricks (ii)–(iv) is the universe typing decision above — a one-iter planner fix, not a build wall.
